prompt: Create a dark, cinematic surreal photo-illustration of a person in left profile, mostly hidden in shadow, exhaling a long horizontal plume of smoke across the frame. The upper-left face area is obscured by a large flat opaque rectangle in dark warm brown, covering the eyes and upper face like an intentional privacy mask. The subject has dark brown loose hair strands visible near the neck and jaw, with only the lower cheek, neck, and hair edge softly lit. The smoke is the main focus: dense, translucent, swirling gray-beige vapor stretching from the mouth toward the right side, with delicate turbulent curls and layered mist. Inside the smoke, embed a faint dreamlike miniature memory scene: silhouettes of people sitting together, a child or rider on a bicycle, trees, and a distant suburban house, all ghostly and semi-transparent as if formed from smoke. The background is an out-of-focus dim interior with vertical curtain or window shapes in muted olive, charcoal, and brown tones, with a narrow cool beam of light falling from above near the center-right. Use moody low-key lighting, shallow depth of field, soft grain, realistic smoke simulation, muted sepia color grading, and a contemplative atmosphere suggesting memories leaving the body as breath. Landscape composition, 3:2 aspect ratio, no readable text.
